basic_details.job_title: ACTREC Senior Project Staff Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: Please refer to the official notification for last date details.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters of Science (M.Sc) in Clinical Research
qualification.details: Senior Project Staff: Masters of Science (M.Sc) in Clinical Research with 3 years of experience in handling clinical trials with experience in statistics (SPSS, R Programming, RedCap).

salary_details.details: Consolidated salary of Rs. 60,500/- p.m. for six months.

all_official_links.label: Download ACTREC Senior Project Staff Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the ACTREC recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the ACTREC recruitment is Senior Project Staff. This is a project-based role within the research field.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Senior Project Staff position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Senior Project Staff position. The recruitment is for a specific project.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Senior Project Staff role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Masters of Science (M.Sc) in Clinical Research. Additionally, 3 years of experience in handling clinical trials with expertise in statistics is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Staff position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,500/- per month for a duration of six months.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Eligible candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q6. When and where is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 22 June 2026. Candidates should report to Ground Floor, Meeting Room No. 27, Proton Therapy Centre, ACTREC, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai - 410210.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring their recent CV, a passport-size photograph, and original as well as Xerox copies of all certificates, including educational qualifications, work experience, and Aadhaar Card for ID proof.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Project Staff role?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be assessed during this interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age limit mentioned for this position?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly state an age limit. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any age-related criteria.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of ACTREC?
faq.answer: The official website of Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) is www.actrec.gov.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information.
